task: I need to send a short note to a client about a delay and don’t want it to sound awkward. Can you draft a couple of versions for me, maybe one more polished and one more plain, so I can pick the better fit?

turns.agent_response:
Absolutely — here are two short options:

**Polished**
Hi [Client Name], quick update: I need a bit more time to finish the final review. I expect to send the completed file by [day/time]. Thanks for your patience.

**Plain**
Hi [Client Name], just a quick note that I’m running a little behind on this and will send it by [day/time]. Thanks.

If you want, I can also make them sound a little firmer or a little warmer.

user_simulator.text: Yeah, those work. Clean and not overdone. I’ll use one of them as-is.
